title: Backend / Veri Tabanı Geliştirici (Gönüllü)
description: Backend / Veri Tabanı Geliştirici (Gönüllü) Mobil Uygulama – Sosyal Fayda Projesi 🎯 Bu İlan Kimler İçin? Bu ilan; Backend geliştirme konusunda deneyimli Veri modelleme ve veri tabanı kurgusu konusunda düşünebilen Gerçek bir sistemin temelini atmak isteyen Teknik üretimini sosyal fayda ile birleştirmek isteyen kişiler içindir. 🧩 Proje Hakkında (Kısa Teknik Çerçeve) Oyuncak Kardeşleri; oyuncağı kendisine küçülmüş çocuklardan oyuncak toplayarak, oyuncağa erişimi kısıtlı çocuklara ulaştıran bir sivil toplum girişimidir. Bu süreç sahada gönüllüler ile yürütülmektedir. Geliştirilecek mobil uygulama: Sadece doğrulanmış gönüllüler tarafından kullanılacaktır Sahadaki bağış süreçlerini dijital olarak kayıt altına alacaktır Operasyonel bir veri altyapısı oluşturacaktır Bu sistemin omurgası backend ve veri tabanı mimarisi olacaktır. 🧠 Teknik Odak (Öncelikli İhtiyaç) Bu ilanda önceliğimiz: 🔹 Backend Mimari Tasarımı API yapısı Veri akışı kurgusu Yetkilendirme / kullanıcı yönetimi Ölçeklenebilir servis tasarımı 🔹 Veri Tabanı & CRM Mantığı Bağış kayıt sistemi Varlık (entity) modelleme Zaman damgalı veri yapıları Medya (foto/video) ilişkili veri kurgusu Süreç takibi (workflow / event-based yapı) 🔹 Veri Tutarlılığı & İzlenebilirlik Her işlemin kayıt altına alınması Geriye dönük izleme (audit trail mantığı) Veri bütünlüğü ⚙️ Sistemden Kısaca Bahsetmek Gerekirse Uygulama; Sahada gönüllülerin teslim aldığı bağışları kayıt altına almasını Her bir bağış için yapılandırılmış veri oluşturulmasını Medya ile desteklenmiş kayıtların tutulmasını Süreçlerin zaman bazlı izlenmesini sağlayan bir altyapı olacaktır. Detaylı ürün tasarımı teknik ekip ile birlikte netleştirilecektir. 👨‍💻 Aradığımız Teknik Profil Backend geliştirme deneyimi Veri tabanı tasarımı (SQL veya NoSQL) bilgisi API geliştirme tecrübesi Veri modelleme bakış açısı Git ile çalışma deneyimi Uzaktan ekip çalışmasına uygunluk Bonus (zorunlu değil): Medya yönetimi (storage/CDN) deneyimi Event-driven sistemlere aşinalık Basit CRM mantıkları üzerine düşünmüş olmak 🌍 Çalışma Modeli Bu pozisyon tamamen gönüllülük esasına dayalıdır Ücretli değildir Uzaktan çalışmaya uygundur Şehir sınırlaması yoktur İsteyen gönüllüler dernek ofisinde de çalışabilir 💡 Neden Bu Projede Yer Almalısınız? Sıfırdan bir sistemin veri mimarisini kurma fırsatı Gerçek dünyada kullanılan bir altyapı geliştirme deneyimi Teknik karar süreçlerinde aktif rol alma Sosyal fayda üreten bir sistemin parçası olma 📌 Önemli Not Bu ilan bir iş fırsatı değil, gönüllü katkı çağrısıdır. Lütfen başvuru yapmadan önce bu çalışmanın ücretli olmadığını bilerek başvurduğunuzdan emin olun. 📩 Başvuru Teknik bilginizi sosyal fayda ile birleştirmek istiyorsanız sizi Oyuncak Kardeşleri ekibine bekliyoruz.

title: Founding Full Stack AI Engineer
description: Location: Fully remote, EMEA / flexible timezone Start date: ASAP Languages: Fluent English is mandatory Industry: AI / Data Infrastructure / B2B SaaS About The Company Pragmatike is recruiting on behalf of an early-stage startup building a distributed AI data infrastructure platform . The company provides real-world training data to AI companies through a global network of 500,000+ contributors across 150+ countries and 100+ languages. The startup owns the full end-to-end pipeline: collection, automated processing, human-in-the-loop QA, and delivery to top-tier AI labs and technology companies. The focus is on building scalable, AI-native pipelines capable of delivering multimodal datasets—audio, image, video, and structured data—at global scale. The product is operational and validated. The current priority is scaling the infrastructure, improving AI-powered QA pipelines, and building reliable contributor and client-facing platforms . The team is fast-moving, product-driven, and values high ownership and technical excellence . Your Responsibilities Design and maintain FastAPI backend services powering the data collection and delivery pipeline Build and iterate React interfaces for internal teams, contributors, and clients Architect AI-powered pipelines for quality assurance, classification, and dataset delivery Own end-to-end feature delivery: backend logic, database schema, frontend interface, deployment Ensure reliability, performance, and observability of async data processing pipelines Collaborate closely with ML engineers, DevOps, and the data team to integrate AI systems into production Set standards and best practices for AI-augmented engineering workflows Contribute to internal tooling that accelerates team velocity and maintains production-grade quality What You Bring 3+ years of professional full stack engineering experience in production environments Strong Python skills and hands-on experience building production APIs with FastAPI Solid React experience, shipping real products to real users Deep command of SQL, including query optimization, indexing, partitioning, and connection pooling Hands-on PostgreSQL experience at scale Experience with background task processing systems (Celery, RQ, SQS, or equivalent) Familiarity with S3-compatible object storage, Docker, and REST API design principles AI-native development workflow — you use AI tools (Cursor, Copilot, Claude) daily, know how to prompt, iterate, verify, and catch errors Experience building AI-integrated systems, pipelines, and production features for model training Ownership mindset — you ship fast, iterate, and care about code quality Nice to Have Experience scaling global data infrastructure or contributor networks Experience with multimodal datasets (audio, image, video) Prior early-stage / founding team experience Exposure to high-volume, performance-critical systems Experience integrating AI pipelines into production workflows Why This Role Will Pivot Your Career This is a founding engineer role at the intersection of full stack engineering and AI infrastructure. You will: Build end-to-end systems that are used by top AI labs and tech companies globally Work directly with founders shaping product, architecture, and technical strategy Own mission-critical AI-powered pipelines for massive, real-world datasets Gain rare early-stage experience, making high-impact decisions that define the trajectory of the company Master AI-augmented development workflows, integrating cutting-edge AI into production-grade software Take on responsibilities far beyond typical senior roles — your work will be visible, high-stakes, and career-defining ﻿ Pragmatike is dedicated to a fair, transparent, and inclusive recruitment process. We ensure that no applicant is discriminated against based on age, disability, gender, gender identity or expression, marital or civil partner status, pregnancy or maternity, race, religion or belief, sex, or sexual orientation. In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), your personal data will be processed lawfully, fairly, and securely. We collect and use your personal data solely for recruitment purposes, including sharing it with our client(s) for employment consideration. You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. We are committed to maintaining the confidentiality and security of your information throughout the recruitment process. ﻿

title: Senior Frontend Engineer (React)
description: After assembling our team in 2006, we grew together over the years and complemented each other to become Turkey’s largest betting site with millions of members! We went beyond our imagination by taking inspiration from life to make Nesine so high-spirited, so full of life! What Makes Nesine So High-Spirited, So Full of Life? Youth, entertainment, excitement, novelties… Strikers, goal-poachers, playmakers… The power of mutual learning, team spirit, technology, quality, hope, the future… Champions, captains, rising stars… Ideas, training, celebrations, records, success stories… People are proud to be a part of a team, proud of the way they complement each other… That’s what makes Nesine so high-spirited, so full of life! Now is the time to be a part of this dream team! Leave the bench, join the team on the field and score a goal with your creative ideas! Dazzle your competition with strategic dribbling and pass the ball between your teammates! If you’re seeking a thrilling career of relentless strikes, put on your jersey and join the game at Nesine and become part of a team full of winners! Full-of-Life Qualities Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. 5+ years of professional experience in JavaScript development, with deep expertise in React (Hooks). Strong experience with Context API and/or Redux for state management. Solid experience working with RESTful APIs. Proven ability to design and develop scalable, reusable, and high-performance frontend architectures. Strong knowledge of JavaScript package managers (Yarn, npm). Hands-on experience with build and bundling tools such as Webpack, Babel, or similar. Strong focus on performance optimization, clean code, and semantic HTML/CSS. Practical understanding of micro frontend and monorepo architectures. A good knowledge of Node.js, SSR & Socket.io. Strong knowledge of frontend monitoring and observability, with hands-on experience using tools such as Sentry, New Relic, etc. for error tracking, performance monitoring and production analysis. Strong awareness of consistent user experience (UX/UI) principles. Extensive experience using Bitbucket for version control (Experience with GitHub or GitLab is considered a plus). Strong advocate of testing and clean code practices ( Hands-on experience with Jest, Testing Library, ESLint, and similar tools). Experience with component-driven development and Storybook / atomic design systems. Experience working with frontend applications deployed on AWS (e.g., S3, CloudFront, CDN strategies, environment-based deployments). Experience building and maintaining large-scale, high-traffic web applications. Comfortable working in Agile / Scrum teams and cross-functional environments. Strong understanding of software engineering best practices across the full SDLC. Strong architectural thinking, problem-solving, and communication skills. Proactive, ownership-driven, and capable of mentoring other team members. A Full Look on the Job Description Own the development, maintenance, and optimization of complex frontend features and applications. Take responsibility throughout the full product lifecycle: design, development, release, and long-term maintenance. Lead and contribute to frontend architectural decisions. Contribute to and improve AWS-based frontend deployment and release processes. Ensure high standards of performance, scalability, security, and code quality. Actively participate in and lead code reviews, providing constructive and high-quality feedback. Support knowledge sharing, technical guidance, and mentoring within the frontend team. Collaborate closely with Product, Design, Backend, and DevOps teams. Continuously evaluate new technologies and propose improvements to existing systems. Build high-performance frontend applications serving millions of users. Full-of-Life Benefits: “Employee benefits” but it’s also known as “Full-of-Life Benefits” in the world of Nesine 🙂 Private health insurance with unlimited coverage extending to spouse and children. A multinet restaurant ticket. Transportation benefits on office working days. In addition to annual leave days, you have three Won’t Make It Today 🙂 days, which you can use whenever you like (we simply call this BAY 🙂). An additional one-day birthday leave to redeem on any day during your birthday week. Company group brands employee discount and free delivery. Gift vouchers on holidays. Gifts on special occasions, including marriage and child birth. Shop as you wish throughout the year with gift transfers to your Digital Wallet! Follow Nesine on LinkedIn to discover our high-spirited, full-of-life team! Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumlusu D Elektronik Şans Oyunları ve Yayıncılık A.Ş. (“Nesine”) tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (“KVKK”) ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla otomatik yollarla işlenecektir. İşlenen kişisel verilerinize ve haklarınız ile ilgili başvuru yöntemlerine ilişkin daha detaylı bilgi için lütfen https://www.nesine.com/kisisel-verileri-koruma/aydinlatma-metni linkini ziyaret ederek "Çalışan Adayı" kategorisini inceleyiniz.

title: Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştirici (PHP / CodeIgniter)
description: Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştirici (PHP / CodeIgniter) Altınay Savunma bünyesinde, savunma sanayi ve havacılık alanlarında yürütülen uluslararası projelerde görev almak üzere; mevcut ERP sistemimizin geliştirilmesi ve yeni modüllerin hayata geçirilmesi süreçlerinde aktif rol üstlenecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Geliştirici arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Çalışma Şekli ve Lokasyon Çalışma Modeli: Tam zamanlı, ofisten (yerinde) çalışma Lokasyon: Teknopark İstanbul, Pendik / İstanbul Sözleşme Tipi: 1 yıl süreli proje bazlı olup, performansa bağlı olarak uzun dönemli iş birliği imkânı sunulmaktadır Görev ve Sorumluluklar Şirket bünyesinde kullanılan ERP sisteminin geliştirilmesi ve yeni modüllerin tasarlanması Mevcut yazılımın bakım, iyileştirme ve refactoring süreçlerinin yürütülmesi Backend ve frontend geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol alınması Veritabanı sorgularının ve sistem performansının optimize edilmesi İş birimleri ile etkin iletişim kurularak ihtiyaçların analiz edilmesi ve uygun teknik çözümlerin geliştirilmesi Yazılım standartlarının sürdürülebilirliğinin sağlanması ve teknik dokümantasyonun hazırlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP ile en az 3 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi CodeIgniter framework’ü ile aktif geliştirme tecrübesi JavaScript, jQuery, HTML ve CSS teknolojilerine hakimiyet MySQL / SQL veritabanı tasarımı ve performans optimizasyonu konularında deneyim REST ve SOAP API geliştirme ve/veya entegrasyon tecrübesi Git versiyon kontrol sistemi kullanımı Analitik düşünme yeteneği ve güçlü problem çözme becerileri Tercih Sebepleri ERP, CRM veya kurumsal iş uygulamaları geliştirme deneyimi Linux sunucu ortamlarında çalışma tecrübesi Elasticsearch konusunda bilgi sahibi veya öğrenmeye istekli Performans ve ölçeklenebilirlik konularına ilgi

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for Fullstack Developers to join our brilliant team Decription We are seeking an experienced full-stack developer to join our team and contribute to the development of features for harmony ecosystem. As a software developer, you will play a key role in building and enhancing the functionality of our ecosystem. You will work closely with our engineering team to design, implement, and optimize new features, ensuring a seamless and efficient development experience. Requirements Strong proficiency in JavaScript/Typescript programming languages Proficiency in server-side languages (Node.js, Java) Familiarity with modern frontend frameworks (React, Angular, Vue.js) Knowledge of responsive design principles Strong proficiency with version control systems Understanding of CI/CD practices and tools Experience in Agile/Scrum, good communication skills and the ability to work well in a team Self-motivated; independent, organized and proactive; highly responsive, flexible, and adaptable when working across multiple teams Good knowledge in written and spoken English Experience in Unit Testing (e.g. Jest, Jasmine, Karma) Personal Skills Required Agile oriented; focused on delivery and customer first. Adaptive; responsive for on-demand changes. Dedicated; working hard to finish tasks on-time with high quality. Communicative; calling before sending e-mail. Open; collecting feedbacks and defining actions for self-improve Have a good level of English knowledge, Paying attention to details, thinking carefully and analytically, Documentation discipline

title: Full-Stack Engineer (Node.js, JavaScript/TypeScript)
description: Company Description Eva is an AI-powered advertising platform designed to support ecommerce brands with flexible solutions, allowing users to fully automate processes or maintain control as needed. Its innovative features include real-time bid optimization, precision keyword management, inventory-aware spending, and profit analytics. Eva offers autonomy through its Autopilot and CoPilot modes or comprehensive account management via Captain Mode, helping brands maximize ROAS and profit across platforms like Amazon, Walmart, and Shopify. Eva is committed to driving growth and success in ecommerce through advanced technology and expert services. Role Description This is a full-time, remote Full-Stack Engineer role, focusing on the development and maintenance of scalable applications using Node.js, JavaScript/TypeScript. The role involves designing, coding, testing, and debugging both front-end and back-end components, ensuring product scalability and performance. Additional responsibilities include collaborating with cross-functional teams, participating in code reviews, optimizing system performance, and maintaining high-quality coding standards. Qualifications Experience with Front-End Development using frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js, and a strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Proficiency in Back-End Web Development with experience in Node.js, Express, RESTful APIs or GraphQL. Solid expertise in Full-Stack Development, integrating both client and server components to deliver seamless functionality. Strong skills in Software Development best practices, including version control, testing, and deployment workflows. Knowledge of Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) for creating responsive and visually appealing user interfaces. Familiarity with modern development tools, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud services such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud is a strong advantage. Ability to work independently in a fully remote setting while collaborating with a global team. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field is preferred. Strong problem-solving skills, adaptability, and a passion for leveraging technology to drive innovative solutions for ecommerce.

title: Full Stack Engineer (Nodejs, JavaScript/TypeScript)
description: About Eva Eva is a results-driven technology and services provider that helps eCommerce brands, resellers, and agencies maximize their growth while reducing operational costs. Eva combines proprietary optimization & intelligence software with Amazon management and 3PL services to optimize our client’s visibility, efficiency, and profitability of their Amazon and eCommerce operations. 90% of Eva’s customers are in the US. Eva has a bottom-up culture, where we expect each individual to drive their own business and apply Eva's principles to every single task. Eva's Principles are Customer Obsession, Accountability & Ownership, Remote Collaboration & Growth, Integrity, and Deliver Results. We believe in empowering each team member to drive their business forward while adhering to these guiding principles. Role Overview We are looking for a Full-Stack Developer with strong background in Node.js and JavaScript or TypeScript to help us build scalable, data-intensive web applications and internal platforms used by global eCommerce clients. This role requires balanced ownership across frontend, backend, and data systems, with exposure to modern event-driven and analytics-heavy architectures. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications using Node.js, React and Next.js Build and maintain scalable RESTful APIs and backend services Work with PostgreSQL for transactional systems and ClickHouse for analytics and large-scale event data Contribute to event-driven architectures using Kafka and/or RabbitMQ Develop and maintain data pipelines that process high-volume events such as orders, ads, user activity, and system events Optimize frontend performance using SSR, SSG, and ISR in Next.js Collaborate closely with product, design, and data teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions Integrate third-party APIs including Amazon, Shopify, and internal services Troubleshoot production issues and take ownership of performance, reliability, and scalability Write clean, testable, and well-documented code Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and technical decision-making Requirements At least 3 years of professional experience as a Full Stack Developer Strong proficiency in React and Node.js and Next.js Experience with cloud platforms, particularly AWS Solid experience with JavaScript / TypeScript Backend development experience with Node.js and API design Experience working with PostgreSQL Good understanding of asynchronous systems, background jobs, and message-based processing Familiarity with event-driven architecture concepts Experience using Git and collaborative development workflows Ability to work effectively in a remote-first environment Strong written and verbal communication skills in English Nice to Have / Strong Plus Hands-on experience with Kafka and RabbitMQ Experience consuming and processing high-volume message streams Experience with ClickHouse or other analytical databases Familiarity with Redis for caching or queues Experience with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms (AWS preferred) Background in eCommerce, especially Amazon or Shopify ecosystems Exposure to microservices and distributed systems

title: Node.js Developer
description: Orion Innovation is a premier, award-winning, global business and technology services firm. Orion delivers game-changing business transformation and product development rooted in digital strategy, experience design, and engineering, with a unique combination of agility, scale, and maturity. We work with a wide range of clients across many industries including financial services, professional services, telecommunications and media, consumer products, automotive, industrial automation, professional sports and entertainment, life sciences, ecommerce, and education. Key Responsibilities System Architecture & Development Conduct system analysis and collaborate with cross-functional teams to optimize existing systems and design new software components. Architect and implement high-performance, cost-efficient, and scalable technical solutions. Develop secure, reliable, and well-documented APIs that meet evolving business needs. Cloud & Distributed Systems Build and optimize cloud-native applications using AWS services. Design and implement micro-services and event-driven architectures for high scalability. Engineer fault-tolerant distributed systems to ensure reliability. Engineering Excellence Deliver high-quality, maintainable code with comprehensive documentation Implement robust testing strategies to ensure system reliability Uphold code quality through reviews and best practices. Collaboration & Process Work closely with developers throughout the entire SDLC to embed quality Effectively self-manage project timelines and deliverables in an agile environment Clearly communicate technical progress and challenges to stakeholders Contribute to continuous improvement of development processes Qualifications 3+ years of professional backend development experience Bachelor's degree in Computer Science (equivalent practical experience) Knowledge, Skills & Abilities Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js. Hands-on experience with AWS (Lambda, S3, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Step Functions, etc.). Experience writing clean, testable, and well-documented code. Knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, etc.). Experience developing and testing cloud-based services and applications. Familiarity with monitoring tools (Datadog, CloudWatch, etc.). Proficiency with Git, JIRA, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines. Strong teamwork and communication skills in technical discussions. Orion is an equal opportunity employer, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, pregnancy, age, national origin, citizenship status, disability status, genetic information, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Candidate Privacy Policy Orion Systems Integrators, LLC And Its Subsidiaries And Its Affiliates (collectively, “Orion,” “we” Or “us”) Are Committed To Protecting Your Privacy. This Candidate Privacy Policy (orioninc.com) (“Notice”) Explains What information we collect during our application and recruitment process and why we collect it; How we handle that information; and How to access and update that information. Your use of Orion services is governed by any applicable terms in this notice and our general Privacy Policy.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Join the best bank to work for in Bulgaria* Who we are: Do you want to join a well-established bank with a start-up culture? No, we’re not joking! We, at tbi , have been one the most profitable banks for years and we are growing at a fast pace. We’re a bank with a long history of success that operates as a start-up and we’re always on the lookout for new opportunities to grow our business. How do we do that? It's all about our people . Our team is made up of brave, passionate and caring people who don’t just want to follow the same path – we want to transform into mobile-first, state-of-the-art lifestyle ecosystem. Our colleagues love working here – 80% of them would recommend tbi as an employer to their friends and family. Our people are engaged in challenging and meaningful work, inspired to grow their potential and career, encouraged to learn and empowered to take decisions. That’s not corporate babble, it’s what our people say. Do you want to play a key role in our unique success story? If so, we're looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our team on the journey to success! We are seeking an experienced Senior Middleware (MW) Python Developer with strong expertise in Python (3.11+) to design, build, and maintain scalable, high-performance middleware services using aiohttp. This role plays a key part in developing secure and reliable backend solutions for mobile banking platforms, with a strong focus on RESTful APIs, API versioning strategies (v1/v2), backward compatibility, and distributed systems. As a senior member of the team, you will take technical ownership, contribute to architectural decisions, and collaborate closely with cross-functional teams across multiple repositories. What You’ll do: Design, develop, and maintain backend and middleware services for mobile banking applications Take ownership of middleware components and contribute to system architecture and technical decisions Build scalable, reusable, and high-performance solutions using Python and asynchronous frameworks (aiohttp) Design, develop, and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices with proper versioning (v1/v2) and backward compatibility Ensure high availability, performance, and reliability in distributed systems Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams (Frontend, Product, Business Analysts, QA) to deliver high-quality solutions Actively participate in Agile ceremonies and provide technical leadership within the team Optimize backend processes, database queries, and overall system performance Troubleshoot complex production issues and drive root-cause analysis Ensure compliance with security standards, banking regulations, and internal policies Maintain clear, accurate, and up-to-date technical documentation Contribute to continuous improvement of architecture, development practices, and team workflows Mentor junior and mid-level developers when needed What you’ll need to succeed: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related technical field 5+ years of professional experience in Python development Strong hands-on experience with Python 3.11+ and asynchronous programming (aiohttp or similar frameworks) Solid understanding of RESTful API design, API versioning strategies, and backward compatibility Experience with Java, particularly Spring Boot, is a strong advantage Knowledge of reactive programming concepts (WebFlux), PostgreSQL, and R2DBC Proven experience building and deploying applications using Docker Strong experience in relational database design (MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, or similar) Hands-on experience with Jira, Bitbucket, and GitLab Excellent understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles and design patterns Experience working in Agile/Scrum development environments English proficiency at B2 level or higher Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently Proven ability to collaborate effectively and provide technical guidance within a team What we offer: Seize the opportunity to grow your career Engage in exciting and meaningful work Get recognition for your work and attitude Become part of a large, friendly and supportive team with 23 nationalities Get additional private health insurance Visit our Career Page to learn more about what makes us different. title: Frontend Developer - React & React Native (Hybrid)
description: Job Description We are looking for talented Frontend Developers to join our growing Mobile and Web teams. If you are passionate about building scalable, high-quality applications and writing clean code, we would love to meet you. Mobile Frontend Developer (React Native) Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain mobile applications using React Native Contribute to native integrations (iOS & Android) when needed Publish and manage releases on App Store & Google Play Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable mobile solutions Occasionally contribute to React (Web) projects Requirements Strong experience with React Native Good knowledge of React (latest versions) Experience with Redux or other state management tools Solid coding skills and clean code practices Familiarity with native mobile development concepts (Swift/Kotlin knowledge is a plus; deep native expertise not mandatory) Experience in App Store / Play Store deployment processes Industry/domain knowledge is a plus Web Frontend Developer (React) Key Responsibilities Develop modern web applications using React Write clean, maintainable, and scalable code Participate in architecture and technical design discussions Requirements Strong hands-on experience with React (latest versions) Ability to perform well in live coding / technical assessments Experience with Tailwind CSS and modern web technologies Strong problem-solving and debugging skills Solid understanding of component-based architecture Ready to build scalable mobile and web applications with a growing team? Apply now and be part of our journey! Amaris Consulting is committed to promoting diversity within its workforce and to creating an inclusive work environment. We consider applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnic origin, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic. Special attention will be given to candidates with disabilities.
